title: The Amazing Mr. Williams
writer: Dwight Taylor, Sy Bartlett, Richard Maibaum
actors: Melvyn Douglas, Joan Blondell, Clarence Kolb
plot: Kenny Williams, a lieutenant on the homicide squad, is engaged to Maxine Carroll, the Mayor's secretary--or is he married to his job? Every time he has a date with his longtime fiancée, he is prevented from keeping it by his devot...
